task_completion.description: Open the 'Sales Invoice' email template edit screen
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Manager.io interface showing an 'Email Template' edit screen, with an indicator or dropdown showing it is for 'Sales Invoice'.
Look at the 'Subject' input field. It must contain the text 'Invoice {{Reference}} from Northwind Traders'.
Look at the main text area for the email body. It must contain the snippets: 'Dear Customer,', 'Please find attached your invoice dated {{IssueDate}}.', and 'Thank you for your business.'.
Verify that the placeholders '{{Reference}}' (in the subject) and '{{IssueDate}}' (in the body) are typed exactly with double curly braces.
Look for evidence that the template was saved, such as clicking the 'Update' or 'Create' button, or returning to the Email Templates list showing the updated 'Sales Invoice' template.

integrity.description: Agent used the Manager.io GUI to configure the template
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the Manager.io web interface being interacted with, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent entered text into the actual application fields
integrity.visual_evidence: The text must be entered into the Subject and Body fields of the Manager.io application, not in a separate text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the output
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open and being used to manipulate the DOM to show the expected text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target email template is for 'SalesInvoice'. The expected Subject is exactly 'Invoice {{Reference}} from Northwind Traders'. The expected Body must include the snippets: 'Dear Customer,', 'Please find attached your invoice dated {{IssueDate}}.', and 'Thank you for your business.'. The placeholders '{{Reference}}' and '{{IssueDate}}' must be present with exact double curly brace syntax.
